case_title: GENERAL CONTRACTORS INSPECTION SERVICE, LTD. VS THOMSON, STEVEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $325.00 FILED BY GENERAL CONTRACTORS INSPECTION SERVICE, LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMSON, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENERAL CONTRACTORS INSPECTION SERVICE, LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMSON, STEVEN $325.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $345.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO STEVEN THOMSON RETUNED SIGNED
